channel.title: 7. Sharing and Feedback :: Báo cáo thực tập
channel.description: General Assessment 1. Working Environment During my internship at FCAJ, I felt the working environment was very comfortable and friendly. Everyone in the team was ready to help when I faced difficulties, especially when I was new to the job. The working atmosphere is serious but does not create pressure, helping me easily integrate and focus on completing assigned tasks.
